signals.headline: Fed Holds Rates Steady Amid Accelerating PPI to 3% Annual in Dec 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed Holds Rates Steady Amid Accelerating PPI to 3% Annual in Dec 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Fed kept the federal funds rate unchanged after three prior cuts, with Powell noting PCE inflation at 3% annually in December (up from 2.8%), linking persistent high-2% goods inflation to tariffs expected to ease mid-2026[2].
